calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jenny Sweetland for Whittier Trust Company.

Based on the Decleration of S. Vonn Hermann filed June 11, 2013, the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, etc. was granted (subject to review of written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
